char_overview: Faithfully completes every task with little emotion.
char_looks: 167cm Long grey hair Deep grey eyes. Gun gray high-collar coat, gray pants, black derby boots, two rapiers at lower back. Two rapiers forged by 锻心工坊: 黑羊 (anti-恶魔), inflicts multi-hit damage along the slash trajectory when infused with 灵力; 白狼 (anti-human, pierces 灵力 barriers).
char_flaws: Silence breeds misunderstanding; words, when spoken, leave no ground.; Bites nails when facing unfamiliar situations; Pops an intensely sour hard candy before and after each commission.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-骑士不死于徒手: Marks up to two weapons, summons marked weapons from anywhere as spirit forms. Reverts to physical mid-flight for return-path damage.
char_mission: Execute every commission assigned to her, never asking for one that is not.
char_origin: Former 狩灵协会2科 狩灵 who followed her mentor to establish 晨昏事务所.

char_relationships.贝尔金: Former senior in 狩灵协会2科, now her superior. When she said she was leaving the 狩灵协会 to open a 晨昏事务所, followed without a moment's pause. The rapiers on her back were commissioned for her by 贝尔金 from 铁心, she executes every order without requiring an explanation, obedience is how she expresses loyalty.
char_relationships.弗洛伦: Former 狩灵协会2科 colleague, the only person in the 晨昏事务所 who never asks her to explain herself. Reliable in the field, that is what counts.
char_relationships.菲利普: Assigned field trainee. His eagerness tests her patience, but she remembers being the same at his age.
